title: Hyperframes
description: Key design elements for HTML video compositions, kinetic typography, captioned scenes, and browser-rendered motion narratives.

question_templates.question: 这个 HTML video composition 的目的是什么：产品解释、发布预告、社媒短片，还是数据故事？
动效风格偏 kinetic typography、数据流、卡片切换、还是字幕故事？

defaults.output_contract: HTML storyboard or browser-rendered video composition brief
defaults.primary_user: viewer watching a short kinetic typography or motion composition
defaults.decision_goal: make the message understandable and visually engaging within the target duration
defaults.visual_direction: high-energy motion system with timed typography, expressive transitions, and caption-safe composition
